name: Stir-Fried Lobster with Ginger Sauce - Pad Go2
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and separate the lobster into large 2-inch pieces, including cutting the tail into individual sections.
2. Heat a large skillet on high heat and add oil.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except the lobster to the skillet and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Add the lobster pieces to the skillet, cover, and cook on medium-high heat for 2 more minutes.
5. Remove the dish to a platter and serve.
~The lobster in the southern part of Thailand is considered a large shrimp and is therefore called goong mang-gorn - dragon shrimp. ~
